analysis.test: Admissibility and probative value of evidence in copyright infringement matters: proof may be established by any means […] (art. L332-4 CPI for the saisie-contrefaçon [infringement seizure]; art. 1353 C. civ. for the burden of proof), but each […] is subject to its own conditions of validity. With respect to bailiff's reports (constats d'huissier), the Court of […] requires (i) that the bailiff not exceed the scope of his mandate, (ii) that he not assist a third party without disclosing that party's identity and relationship to the petitioner, and (iii) that the report be dated and unaltered. Screenshots not authenticated by a bailiff's report are vulnerable to challenges as to authenticity and fixed date (date certaine). The burden of proof rests on the […] (actori incumbit probatio).
faits: Bailiff's reports of October 2 and 5, 2019 (Exhibits 5, 6, 8, and 8-bis): report on the Bastille website, report on Amazon.fr, report concerning the product descriptions of the Tempo and Carto Royale 4 — drawn up by Maître Thomas Berger 5, bearing a fixed date (date certaine) enforceable against third parties.
Bailiff's report on YouTube (Exhibit 11) documenting the online presence of the disputed content.
Order […] 2 dated July 24, 2018 (Exhibit 7): a dated commercial document establishing the priority of Méridian Studios' exploitation.
Méridian Studios' Kbis extract (Exhibit 1): certain date of commencement of business activity under the name Bastille.
Screenshot dated December 7, 2018 (Exhibit 4-bis) and jedisjeux.net extract (Exhibit 3): captures not authenticated by a bailiff's report, vulnerable to challenges as to authenticity and date.

Correspondence […] between A. Julien Mercier and Méridian Studios (Exhibit 4, adverse party) and List of Bastille Updates (Exhibit 24, adverse party): adverse-party documents whose fixed date (date certaine) and authenticity are contestable.
Capture of the Amazon.fr page constituted as Exhibit 6-bis by CBA: supplementary bailiff's report reinforcing the evidentiary chain regarding online exploitation.
analysis.faille: Absence of a bailiff's report for Exhibit 4-bis and Exhibit 3; absence of a dedicated bailiff's report for Quiz Mania (the principal act of infringement alleged); absence of a dated probative deposit (enveloppe Soleau or INPI filing) predating the […] of Bastille for the original elements claimed.
analysis.riposte: The bailiff's reports […] are regular: they document publicly accessible websites (Bastille, Amazon, YouTube) without collecting unauthorized spontaneous statements, which […] distinguishes them from the situation addressed in Cass. civ. 1, April 2, 2009 (no. 08-10.656). Commission […] 2 of July 24, 2018 and the Kbis constitute independent, dated commercial evidence separate from the bailiff's reports. As for Exhibits 3 and 4 Bis, their probative value is subsidiary: they corroborate the bailiff's reports without constituting their primary foundation. With respect to adverse Exhibit 24 (list of Bastille updates), its authenticity and certain date are contested for lack of a bailiff's report or qualified timestamp.
analysis.pourquoi: The core body of evidence (bailiff's reports […], order […] 2, Kbis) is solid and bears a certain date. However, Exhibit 4 Bis (screenshot of December 7, 2018) and Exhibit 3 (extract from jedisjeux.net) have not been authenticated by a bailiff and may be challenged as to their authenticity and date. Furthermore, adverse exhibits 4 and 24 (exchanges between Julien Mercier/Méridian Studios and the Bastille update log) have been filed without a verifiable certain date, but their mere introduction into the proceedings creates a doubt that the court will have to resolve. Quiz Mania, the core subject of the accusation, has not yet been documented by a specific bailiff's report among the listed exhibits.

autorites.title: L332-4 — Code de la propriété intellectuelle
Cass. civ. 1, 08-10.656, 2009-04-02
themes: recueil des déclarations spontanées par l'huissier instrumentaire
autorites.summary: En l'absence de découverte préalable sur les lieux de la saisie d'objets argués de contrefaçon, l'huissier instrumentaire ne peut, sans y avoir été expressément et précisément autorisé, produire aux personnes présentes ceux des objets visés par l'ordonnance de saisie-contrefaçon afin de recueillir les déclarations spontanées quant aux actes argués de contrefaçon

analysis.acte_referme: Supplementary bailiff's report covering Quiz Mania (screenshots, features, reproduced card descriptions); retroactive report or digital certification (qualified eIDAS timestamp) of Exhibit 4-bis; INPI filing or enveloppe Soleau for the creative elements predating 2018.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier contends that the bailiff's reports […] exceed their mandate or contain formal irregularities (collection of spontaneous statements without express judicial authorization, assistance of an unidentified third party), and that the unattested screen captures (Exhibits 3 and 4 Bis) lack a certain date and verifiable authenticity, rendering the evidentiary chain insufficient to establish the material facts of infringement.
analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée and Julien Mercier argue, relying on Exhibit 4 (correspondence […] between Julien Mercier and Méridian Studios) and Exhibit 24 (list of Bastille updates), that the development of Bastille predates and is independent of the works at issue, which […] would deprive the bailiff's reports of their demonstrative force with respect to any infringing copying. They further invoke the holding of Cass. civ. 1, 2 avril 2009 (n°08-10.656) to contend that the reports […] would be irregular if they recorded statements or assisted a third party without express judicial authorization, thereby undermining the very admissibility of the evidence produced. Finally, Exhibit 5 of the adverse party (official letter of October 5, 2021) is tendered to show that Méridian Studios responded belatedly or inconsistently to the mise en demeure [cease-and-desist letter], which […] could be construed as an implicit acknowledgment of the absence of exclusive rights in the claimed elements.

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 24 – List of Bastille updates (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: Internal document bearing no certified date or qualified timestamp; authenticity is contestable in the absence of a bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) or a qualified electronic signature; does not establish the priority of the elements claimed by Méridian Studios

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 4 – Correspondence […] Julien Mercier and Méridian Studios (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: Emails whose certain date has not been established by a qualified third party; content susceptible of contradictory interpretation; does not constitute proof of prior art […] but only of a commercial relationship

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 21 – CA Paris, 6 juillet 2018, n°17-07.613 (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: Precedent from a separate case whose facts are not identical to those of the present matter; the holding depends on the specific circumstances of that case and cannot be mechanically transposed

pieces_attendues: Dedicated bailiff's report covering Quiz Mania (screenshots, card descriptions, reproduced features)
Qualified eIDAS timestamp or digital certification of Exhibit 4-bis (screenshot dated December 7, 2018)
INPI filing / enveloppe Soleau predating 2018 for the creative elements of Bastille
Certified public accountant's affidavit […] […] corroborating the […] of exploitation (sales variations 2020/2021).

autorites_adverses.title: Cass. civ. 1, 08-10.656, 2009-04-02
themes: recueil des déclarations spontanées par l'huissier instrumentaire
autorites_adverses.summary: En l'absence de découverte préalable sur les lieux de la saisie d'objets argués de contrefaçon, l'huissier instrumentaire ne peut, sans y avoir été expressément et précisément autorisé, produire aux personnes présentes ceux des objets visés par l'ordonnance de saisie-contrefaçon afin de recueillir les déclarations spontanées quant aux actes argués de contrefaçon
